title: Anthropic — Building AI to serve humanity
description: At Anthropic, we build AI to serve humanity's long-term well-being. We are an AI safety company building reliable, interpretable, steerable AI systems. Maker of Claude.

sections.title: Claude is a space to think.
sections.lede: At Anthropic, we build AI to serve humanity's long-term well-being.

background.alt: Editorial photograph illustrating thoughtful AI research.

sections.text: Forge-static approximation of anthropic.com authored from SSR-extractable headings + meta description. Pixel-rep rotation target per PlausiDen-Forge #222. Not affiliated with Anthropic; the substrate uses Anthropic as a reference shape for the editorial_purity_gate's research-org audit (Anthropic ships a near-editorial-press hero shape that the gate considers a positive reference rather than a SaaS-marketing target).

sections.body: At Anthropic, we build AI to serve humanity's long-term well-being.

sections.heading: Latest releases + research.
sections.lede: Six surfaces — model, governance, principles, public data, curriculum, transparency tooling — that together describe how an AI lab can be auditable from the outside.

items.title: Opus 4.7
items.body: Claude Opus 4.7 — flagship model. Frontier reasoning + coding + agent capability. Same model family as Claude Code's default.

items.title: RSP
items.body: Responsible Scaling Policy. Published commitment to capability thresholds + the corresponding safety mitigations that must be in place before training crosses them. The reference shape for AI lab governance.

items.title: Constitution
items.body: Claude's Constitution. Published principles + the constitutional-AI training method that derives behavior from them. Auditable from the outside.

items.title: Index
items.body: Anthropic's Economic Index. Public dataset tracking how AI is used in the real economy. Same dataset the Anthropic policy team uses internally — published rather than hoarded.

items.title: Academy
items.body: Anthropic Academy: Build and Learn with Claude. Free curriculum on building with Claude. Developer-facing rather than research-facing — same substrate, different audience.

items.title: Glasswing
items.body: Project Glasswing (preview). Anthropic's research initiative on transparency tooling. The substrate makes AI behavior legible to non-researchers.

sections.text: Anthropic's branding chooses long-horizon framing over per-quarter feature drops. The Claude on Mars campaign — and the substrate it represents — is what an AI lab that's optimizing for the next century looks like, not the next earnings call.

sections.title: Open the live Anthropic site.
sections.lede: This is the Forge-static approximation. The actual product lives at the canonical URL.
